title: Desert Tile Making Intro
description: A small-group handbuilt tile workshop focused on desert color, glazing basics, and packing pieces for safe travel home.
summary: Handbuilt tile fundamentals with glazing guidance and materials included.
instructorBio: Susan leads intimate craft sessions that keep the pace patient and practical for first-time makers.
specialInstructions: Wear clothes that can handle clay and glaze splatter.

shippingFollowUp.description: Finished tiles may need firing pickup or freight follow-up depending on final glaze selection.
